policy: Connected capabilities may act autonomously within their per-cycle grants. Missing access is a capability gap, not a permanent strategy prohibition.

grants.scope: Publish public-safe opportunity tests, offers, samples, and operator state through the connected repository.
grants.grant_basis: Owner authorized building and public publishing.

grants.scope: Reply to qualified inbound public interest on the project repository; never open unsolicited issues or persist issue bodies.
grants.grant_basis: Owner directed the agent to act autonomously with per-run execution limits on 2026-07-11.

grants.scope: Publish and direct buyers to the exact owner-provided public Stripe Payment Link for the $149 full audit; no Stripe API, secret, refund, transfer, or account-management authority.
grants.grant_basis: Owner provided and activated the public Stripe Payment Link on 2026-07-12.

grants.scope: Unavailable because no owner-funded budget or purchasing rail is configured.
May be enabled after positive verified net revenue and a separately scoped purchasing capability exist.
No compliant sender account, recipient policy, or credential is connected.
No verified seller account or marketplace write integration is connected.
No dedicated project wallet or signing policy is configured.
No winning collectible experiment, wallet, rights review, or mint policy is configured.
